generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on foreign allies for our defense? That's a risk we can't afford. Strategic autonomy means investing in our own security, ensuring we're never caught off guard. Look at how quickly the situation in Taiwan escalated—we need to be prepared, not dependent. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
